sanskrit:
यो मामजमनादिं च वैत्ति लोकमहेश्वरम्।
असंमूढः स मर्त्येषु सर्वपापैः प्रमुच्यते॥
transliteration: yo mām ajam anādiṁ ca vetti loka-maheśvaram | asaṁmūḍhaḥ sa martyeṣu sarva-pāpaiḥ pramucyate ||
literal_meaning: Anyone who knows Me as unborn, beginningless, the Supreme Lord of all worlds—undeluded among mortals—is freed from all sins.
contextual_meaning: Correct perception of the Self’s eternal, unconditioned nature dissolves the guilt-identity that perpetuates psychological bondage.
psychological_state: Post-insight catharsis: the mind recognizes its own innocence once the true Self is distinguished from the historical narrative of 'bad me.'
trigger_scenario: A client realizes, 'I am not my trauma story,' and for the first time feels the weight of shame lifting from their body.
anchor_text: Know yourself as the eternal, unborn witness and every guilt dissolves.
